testcase.name: testCurrentVisibleVersionForOtherUser
testcase.failure:
org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError:
expected: "COMMITTED" but was: "OPEN" at com.plm.PlmTransactionTest.testCurrentVisibleVersionForOtherUser(PlmTransactionTest.java:218) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596)

testcase.name: testOnlyOneOpenTxPerUser

failure.message: Expecting code to raise a throwable.

testcase.name: testCommit
